expectations.text: Response covers technical SEO checks (robots.txt, sitemap, HTTPS)
expectations.evidence: Section 'Indexing Issues' covers robots.txt, sitemap, Google Search Console, and HTTPS redirect check. Also mentions canonical URL and noindex meta tag in the Meta Tags section.

expectations.text: Response analyzes on-page SEO (title, meta description, headings)
expectations.evidence: Section 'Meta Tags' covers title tag (50-60 chars), meta description (150-160 chars), canonical tag, and robots meta tag. Quick checklist items include these checks.
Section 'Structured Data' mentions checking for JSON-LD removal, lists Product, SoftwareApplication, Offer, Organization, and WebPage schemas. References Google's Rich Results Test tool.

expectations.text: Response evaluates Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS)
expectations.evidence: Section 'Core Web Vitals' covers LCP (<2.5s), CLS (<0.1), and INP (<200ms) with specific concerns about hero video. Mentions PageSpeed Insights, Lighthouse, and Search Console for measurement.

Section 'Recommendations' provides 4 ranked guesses of most likely causes. Quick Checklist provides 11 numbered items. However, no formal severity/priority classification system (P0-P3 etc.) is used - just an ordered list.
